chunks.text: Student Award: Timothy B. Campbell Innovation Award | EECS at UC Berkeley Timothy B. Campbell Innovation Award This award is presented to a Computer Science or Electrical Engineering undergraduate or graduate student who demonstrates a spirit of innovation, collaboration, and creativity through their research and personal life. This award honors the memory of Tim Campbell, a CS PhD Student who was widely known for his innovative spirit, creativity, and cross-functional collaboration. Awardees 2024-2025 Nagesh Patle 2023-2024 Ritwik Gupta, Lucy Revina 2022-2023 Justin Kerr 2021-2022 Amil Khanzada 2020-2021 Ashwin Balakrishna, Jennifer Grannen, Priya Sundaresan, Brijen Thananjeyan 2019-2020 Varda Shrivastava 2018-2019 Andrew Head 2017-2018 Geun Ho Ahn 2016-2017 Tomas Vega Galvez 2015-2016 Joanne Lo
